r3ct_base_core.message.core_exists_hint: If the block was destroyed due to an error, go to those coordinates to load the chunk. The game will notice it's missing and reset your limit.

r3ct_base_core.message.effect.pool_locke: This effect pool is still locked!
r3ct_base_core.message.effect.already_un: This effect has already been unlocked!
r3ct_base_core.message.effect.missing_xp: Not enough XP to unlock the effect.
r3ct_base_core.message.slot.not_unlocked: You haven't unlocked this effect yet!
r3ct_base_core.message.slot.already_in_u: This effect is already in use in another slot!

r3ct_base_core.gui.tooltip.tier0_desc: Build the Tier 1 upgrade to activate the Core.
r3ct_base_core.tier.1.title: Awakening
r3ct_base_core.tier.2.title: Expansion
r3ct_base_core.tier.3.title: Fortress
r3ct_base_core.tier.4.title: Wealth
r3ct_base_core.tier.5.title: Magic
r3ct_base_core.tier.6.title: Nature
r3ct_base_core.tier.7.title: Power
r3ct_base_core.tier.8.title: Domination
r3ct_base_core.tier.9.title: Triumph
r3ct_base_core.tier.10.title: Finality
r3ct_base_core.tier.11.title: Depths
All furnaces within the base process resources 25% faster.
r3ct_base_core.effect.anti_trample.name: Untouchable Crops
r3ct_base_core.effect.anti_trample.desc: Jumping on farmland within the base does not destroy crops.
r3ct_base_core.effect.crop_growth.name: Growth Aura
r3ct_base_core.effect.crop_growth.desc: Randomly accelerates the growth of crops and plants within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.fall_resistance.de: Reduces fall damage taken by 25% within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.satiation.name: Aura of Satiation
r3ct_base_core.effect.satiation.desc: Automatically restores the food saturation bar for players within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.anti_spawn.name: Spawn Block
r3ct_base_core.effect.anti_spawn.desc: Completely prevents natural monster spawns within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.night_vision.name: Feline Eyes
r3ct_base_core.effect.night_vision.desc: Grants perfect night vision to players within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.animal_growth.name: Breeder's Aura
r3ct_base_core.effect.animal_growth.desc: Baby animals within the base grow up 25% faster.
r3ct_base_core.effect.extended_reach.des: Increases block interaction range by 1 for players within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.fire_immunity.name: Aura of Fire Immunity
r3ct_base_core.effect.fire_immunity.desc: Grants players complete immunity to fire and lava within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.anti_explosion.des: Explosions within the base do not destroy any blocks.
r3ct_base_core.effect.pet_protection.des: Pets within the base take 25% less damage and ignore explosions and fire.
r3ct_base_core.effect.slow_falling.name: Lightness
r3ct_base_core.effect.slow_falling.desc: Slows falling speed and negates fall damage for players within the base.
r3ct_base_core.effect.mending_pulse.name: Mending Pulse
r3ct_base_core.effect.mending_pulse.desc: Restores 5 durability to a random Mending item in players' inventories every 5 seconds within the base.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.root.title: Architect of a New Era
r3ct_base_core.advancement.root.desc: Obtain or place your very first Base Core.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.first_upgrade: Invest resources and upgrade the Base Core to Level 1.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.tier_5.title: Lord of the Manor
r3ct_base_core.advancement.tier_5.desc: Expand your territory by upgrading the Base Core to Level 5.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.max_tier.desc: Reach the ultimate Level 11 Base Core. You own this place.
Unlock your first effect in the Base Core.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.all_slots.des: Activate 4 different effects in the Base Core simultaneously.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.all_effects.d: Purchase access to absolutely every effect across all pools.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.safe_zone.des: Activate the Anti-Spawn and Grief Ward effects simultaneously.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.farming_combo: Combine the Growth Aura and Anti-Trample effects on a single farm.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.moving_day.de: Destroy and pick up a max-level Base Core.
